name: EKGolf
about: EKGolf is an indoor golf facility featuring state-of-the-art simulators and a pro shop, designed for year-round play regardless of weather. The venue offers a dedicated golf-focused environment without a bar or restaurant, prioritizing practice, play, and skill improvement. Services include professional golf lessons, PXG club fitting, strength training, and corporate event packages, alongside a retail shop for golf technology and equipment.
why_golfers_like_it: Highly accurate simulator feedback that translates to real-world performance
Focus on golf without the distractions of a restaurant or bar
Year-round access to practice and play in a controlled environment
Professional-grade launch monitors and club fitting technology
Comprehensive services including lessons, fitness, and simulator installation

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB policy allowed, with mini-fridges provided at each bay

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced ball tracking technology mentioned across the site
Premium club fitting technology and equipment used

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or rent equipment. The facility is designed to accommodate both personal and rental clubs for use in the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, EKGolf operates on a BYOB policy. Mini-fridges and comfortable seating are available at each simulator bay for your refreshments.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18-hole rounds typically take 1.5-2 hours depending on group size and simulator availability. Booking ahead is recommended during peak times.

faq.question: Is EKGolf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers free Sunday night golf for high school students and provides a welcoming environment for juniors and youth golfers looking to improve their game.
